title: gh#60: R1.5 — Sweep: delete old publish services and shared classifiers
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/60.
Backlog section: Candidate 1 — Publisher seam.

## Context

Final PR in Candidate 1. Removes the now-dead code paths once R1.4 has been merged and tests stay green. Also overlaps with existing issue #14 (extract shared Twitter client factory) — close #14 as superseded by this work.

## Scope

Deletions:
- `packages/worker/src/twitter-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/linkedin-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/facebook-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/shared/src/lib/error-classifier.ts` exports for `classifyTwitterError`, `classifyLinkedInError`, `classifyFacebookError` (kept private inside each Publisher)
- `ClassifiedError` type, if no other consumers remain — verify with \`rg ClassifiedError\`. If consumers exist outside the Publishers, leave the type and audit those callers in a follow-up issue.

Updates:
- `packages/shared/src/index.ts` — drop the deleted re-exports
- Any test files referencing the deleted services — verify removed cleanly, no orphaned imports
- Close gh#14 (extract shared Twitter client factory) — superseded by this candidate

## Out of scope

- Behavior changes (R1.4 already delivered them)
- TokenVault (deferred per ADR-0002)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` passes
- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` passes
- `rg "twitter-publish.service|linkedin-publish.service|facebook-publish.service"` returns no matches in src
- gh#14 closed with reference to this PR

## References

- ADRs: [0001](../blob/main/docs/adr/0001-publish-failure-is-thrown-not-returned.md), [0002](../blob/main/docs/adr/0002-publisher-receives-raw-profile-row.md)
- Closes #14
- Depends on: #59

history.reasoning: Original evidence is still current. The three old worker publish service files still exist, `packages/shared/src/lib/error-classifier.ts` still exists and exports `ClassifiedError`, `classifyTwitterError`, `classifyLinkedInError`, and `classifyFacebookError`, and `packages/shared/package.json` still exposes `./lib/error-classifier`. `packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts` still imports `classifyTwitterError` and `ClassifiedError` from `@sms/shared/lib/error-classifier`, while worker tests still import the old Facebook and LinkedIn publish services. The top-level `packages/shared/src/index.ts` no longer re-exports the classifier, but `packages/shared/src/lib/index.ts` still does. The acceptance grep for old publish services still returns matches in src. `pnpm --filter @sms/worker typecheck` and `pnpm --filter @sms/shared typecheck` both pass, which shows the current code is internally consistent but does not satisfy the requested sweep. Targeted Vitest runs could not start because the read-only sandbox prevented Vite from writing `.vite-temp` config files, so the test failure is environmental, not evidence of a code failure.

Original evidence paths no longer exist in the current repo: the three old worker publish service files and packages/shared/src/lib/error-classifier.ts are absent, and packages/shared/src/index.ts plus packages/shared/src/lib/index.ts do not re-export an error classifier. The acceptance grep for twitter-publish.service/linkedin-publish.service/facebook-publish.service in packages/worker/src and packages/shared/src returns no matches. Current code keeps platform classifiers as private functions inside packages/worker/src/publishers/twitter.ts, linkedin.ts, and facebook.ts; remaining ClassifiedError references are local types in those publisher files and post-lifecycle.service.ts, not imports from the deleted shared classifier. @sms/shared package exports also no longer expose ./lib/error-classifier. Typecheck passes for both @sms/worker and @sms/shared. Targeted Vitest runs could not start because the read-only sandbox prevented Vite from writing .vite-temp config files, so that test failure is environmental and does not indicate the finding remains open.
